---
title: "Waterbirds"
author: "Dana Lanceman"
date: "8/23/2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)

wb <- read_excel("C:/Users/danal/OneDrive - UNSW/Desktop/Honours_UNSW/Assessment/cumbung_assessment/raw/waterbird_ecosystem_complex_2.xlsx", "long_alldata")

head(wb)
```

```{r scatterplots - all data}
ggplot(wb, aes(x=rainfall_log, y=Waterbirds_log, fill = Wetland)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Wetland)) 

ggplot(wb, aes(x=Flows_3mos_log, y=Waterbirds_log, fill = Wetland)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Wetland)) 

ggplot(wb, aes(x=Flows_6mos_log, y=Waterbirds_log, fill = Wetland)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Wetland)) 

ggplot(wb, aes(x=Flows_12mos_log, y=Waterbirds_log, fill = Wetland)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Wetland)) 



```
